tasks.label: build active C file
args: list_dir="${fileDirname}/../.."; mkdir -p "$list_dir/build"; shopt -s nullglob; srcs=("${fileDirname}"/*.c); if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then srcs+=("$list_dir"/base/*.c); fi; includes=("-I${fileDirname}"); if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then includes+=("-I$list_dir/base"); fi; clang "${srcs[@]}" "${includes[@]}" -g -o "$list_dir/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"

tasks.label: run active C file
args: list_dir="${fileDirname}/../.."; mkdir -p "$list_dir/build"; shopt -s nullglob; srcs=("${fileDirname}"/*.c); if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then srcs+=("$list_dir"/base/*.c); fi; includes=("-I${fileDirname}"); if [ -d "$list_dir/base" ]; then includes+=("-I$list_dir/base"); fi; clang "${srcs[@]}" "${includes[@]}" -g -o "$list_dir/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}" && "$list_dir/build/${fileBasenameNoExtension}"
